document_title: Dataset Description and Data Definitions for Select Datasets on DOT's Open Data Catalog
source: U.S. Department of Transportation - Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA)
update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time

daily_difference.description: Includes records that have been updated or added since the previous run of the dataset. May include all other records for the carrier/broker/freight forwarder for completeness.

full_baseline.description: Includes all records (including historical values where appropriate) as of the latest dataset update.

datasets.name: Carrier
datasets.description: Records for all carriers/brokers/freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT number, docket number, entity census, authority, and insurance data.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.definition: Mexican Government registration code for Mexican carriers

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance required (in thousands)

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.definition: Amount of BI&PD insurance on file (in thousands)

datasets.name: Insur
datasets.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked by docket number. Entities can hold multiple policies. The daily difference dataset shows removals as blank records (all empty or 00000 values except docket number).

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: Insurance Type
fields.note: For type 1, amounts are in fields 4 and 5. For types 2, 3, 4 the amounts will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands. Company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this value.

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (may be administered by a branch with a different name)

datasets.name: ActPendInsur
datasets.description: Information on implementation dates of active or pending insurance policies including posted date, effective date, and cancel effective date. Also contains insurance company name, BI&PD limits, DOT number and docket number.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Form Code
fields.note: For form codes 91, 91X, and 82, amounts are in fields 8 and 9. For 34, 83, 84, 85, amounts will be 0.

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.definition: Insurance company name for policy (may be administered by a branch with a different name)

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Limit
fields.definition: Amount in thousands. Company shall not be liable for amounts in excess of this value.

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

datasets.name: AuthHist
datasets.description: History of each authority granted to a carrier/broker/freight forwarder, including dates of the original authority action (e.g. granted) and final authority action (e.g. revoked). Multiple authorities per entity means multiple records.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Sub Number
fields.definition: Action sequence number; not commonly used

fields.name: Final Authority Served Date
fields.definition: Date final authority action became effective

datasets.name: BOC3
datasets.description: Records for each BOC3 agent hired by a carrier/broker/freight forwarder. Each entity must hire a BOC3 agent for legal representation to obtain operating authority. Some entities may act as their own BOC3 agent.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Zip Code
fields.definition: Process agent company address zip code

datasets.name: InsHist
datasets.description: Information on previous insurance policies for carriers/brokers/freight forwarders. Contains cancellation method (cancelled, replaced, name change, transferred), policy type, policy number, and effective/cancellation dates. All insurance info relates to the policy being cancelled, replaced, or prior to a name change — NOT the subsequent policy.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Cancel/Replace/Name Change/Transfer Form
fields.definition: The form that executed the cancellation, replaced the original form, or executed the name change/transfer

values.36: BMC Surety Bond Cancellation Form (for cancelled)
values.85C: BMC Cancellation for Trust Funds (for cancelled)

values.*: Not BIPD (Cargo, Surety, or Trust Fund)

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

fields.name: Insurance Class Code
fields.definition: For BI&PD form codes; indicates primary (P) or excess (E)

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.definition: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Limit Amount
fields.definition: Amount in thousands. When class code is E, this is the value of the primary insurance.
fields.note: Only populated for form codes 91, 91X, 82. For 34, 83, 84, 85 this will be 0.

fields.name: BI&PD Max Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Cancel Effective Date
fields.definition: Date the policy is effectively cancelled

values.Term/REPL: Replacement was executed by a new policy submission

datasets.name: Rejected
datasets.description: Information on insurance forms rejected by FMCSA. Contains policy details, rejection date, and rejection reason (e.g. 'Policy is already cancelled').

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type Description
fields.definition: Insurance type associated with the rejected form

fields.name: Maximum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Maximum dollar amount covered by the insurance policy (in thousands)

fields.name: Rejected Date
fields.definition: Date the submitted form was rejected

fields.name: Rejected Reason
fields.definition: The reason the form was rejected

fields.name: Minimum Coverage Amount
fields.definition: Minimum insurance amount required for the entity (in thousands)

datasets.name: Revocation
datasets.description: Information on carrier/broker/freight forwarder authorities that have been revoked by FMCSA. Includes entity identifiers, type of authority revoked, and reason.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.definition: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers (MC000000, FF000000 or MX000000)

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.definition: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.definition: Operating authority can be either common, contract, or broker

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.definition: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity

disclaimer: Data provided as a public service by FMCSA for informational purposes only. Does not constitute legal advice or a legal contract. Data is a snapshot at time of generation and is constantly changing. FMCSA is not liable for any damage or loss from use of this data.
